comment: PEDAL BUILD manifest for Shatter (2-knob). build.py reads THIS file; manifest.json is the 6-knob desktop-preview manifest. Slice length, stutter subdivision, and reverse probability are baked in shatter.c.
gid_comment: 0x08 = Delay category -> SONAME prefix ZDL_DLY_. Grouped under DLY (fewest stock effects = easy to find).
audio_nop_comment: Set true for a UI-only smoke build before trusting the DSP.
